scripts.start: bun run dependencies:update && bun run prisma:generate && bun run scripts/start.ts normal
scripts.start:docker: bun run dependencies:update && bun run prisma:generate && bun run scripts/start.ts docker
scripts.dev: bun run dependencies:update && bun run prisma:generate && bun --watch scripts/start.ts normal
scripts.dev:docker: bun run dependencies:update && bun run prisma:generate && bun --watch scripts/start.ts docker
